prompts.name: Assessment Question Bank Generator
prompts.trigger: Batch: generate 50+ questions per level per dimension quarterly
prompts.user_prompt_template: Generate {COUNT} assessment questions for the {DIMENSION} dimension at Level {LEVEL}. Difficulty: {DIFFICULTY}. Return questions as JSON array: [{question, options (if MC), answer, difficulty, dimension, skill_tested}]. Ensure variety — no two questions test the same exact concept.

prompts.name: Personalized Study Plan Generator
prompts.trigger: After placement, after each assessment, or on demand (!plan)

prompts.name: Onboarding Sequence Messages
prompts.trigger: When new member joins — 8 messages over 48 hours
prompts.user_prompt_template: Generate the Onboarding Message Sequence for a new {LEVEL} learner named {NAME} whose goal is {GOAL} and who chose the {TRACK} track. Native language: Arabic. Generate all 8 messages (one per onboarding step) with: step_number, send_at (hour offset from join), subject, message_text (bilingual for L0), action_required, button_or_link. Messages should be warm, clear, and reduce overwhelm. Return JSON array of 8 message objects.
